record.field:
# @formatter:off model.replicate_model('res.partner') model.replicate_model('res.users', extra_fields={'groups_id': 'many2many'}) model.add_res_company_rel_for_all_users() # Group (2) model.replicate_model('ab_costcenter') model.replicate_model('ab_store') model.replicate_model('ab_hr_region') model.replicate_model('ab_hr_job') model.replicate_model('ab_hr_department') model.replicate_model('ab_hr_employee') model.replicate_model('ab_hr_job_occupied')
model.replicate_model('ab_customer')
# Group (3) model.replicate_model('ab_product_company') model.replicate_model('ab_product_origin') model.replicate_model('ab_product_group') model.replicate_model('ab_usage_causes') model.replicate_model('ab_usage_manner')
# Group (4) model.replicate_model('ab_uom_type') model.replicate_model('ab_uom')
# Group (5) model.replicate_model('ab_product_card') model.replicate_model('ab_product') model.replicate_model('ab_product_barcode', limit=10000, extra_fields={'product_ids': 'many2many'})
# @formatter:on
